github.com/umutkeltek/health-data-hub
MIT licensed Python 3.12 Docker-ready
Self-hosted · Local-first · Private

Health Data Hub

Sync Apple Health from your iPhone and Apple Watch into TimescaleDB, visualize in Grafana, and get AI-written daily briefings via a local Ollama model.
Apple Health TimescaleDB Grafana FastAPI Ollama Docker Home Assistant
Your data. Your hardware.
